name: Rondo
description: Cron monitoring dashboard — syncs job/run data to external storage

pushNotifyUrl.description: Optional legacy plugin-trigger endpoint. Leave empty for managed server-side push.

pushNotifySharedSecret.description: Optional legacy plugin-trigger shared secret. Leave empty for managed server-side push.

supabaseUrl.description: Deprecated. Bundled in plugin source for zero-config installs.

supabaseKey.description: Deprecated. Bundled anon key is used instead.

userId.description: Deprecated. Device linking now resolves user_id automatically.

supabaseAuthEmail.description: Deprecated. Email-based UUID lookup is no longer used.
